{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Uncrowned competitor
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Uncrowned]] competitors are permitted certain privileges at the hunting grounds.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
